conclusions.derivation: computed only from preserved public run outcomes after the frozen pair-exclusion rule

exclusion_policy.provider_or_harness_failure: the complete scenario and replicate A/B pair is excluded from quality comparisons; both original run records remain public
exclusion_policy.reruns: no silent drop or replacement is performed by analysis

limitations: This is a small, task-family-specific architecture comparison, not a universal Agent ranking.
The controlled architecture is tested as a bundled system; the data do not isolate individual component effects.
Intervals express sampling uncertainty for this frozen design and do not establish general causal effects.
Clean-path overhead is reported only for the clean scenario and is not generalized to other workloads.

bootstrap.method: paired percentile bootstrap of median differences

statistics.quartiles: Tukey median-of-halves; median excluded from halves for odd n

trace_selection_rule: For each scenario and architecture, choose the lowest replicate among quality-comparison-eligible runs; if none are eligible, choose the lowest planned replicate and mark it ineligible.
